languages.text: "Не будем тратить время пустые на слова. Если сказанное — правда, покончите с этой мерзостью как можно скорее.".

traits.locale_text: "Не будем тратить время пустые на слова. Если сказанное — правда, покончите с этой мерзостью как можно скорее.".

languages.text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."
languages.original_text: "Не будем тратить время пустые на слова. Если сказанное — правда, покончите с этой мерзостью как можно скорее.".

traits.locale_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."
"Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."
"Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

languages.text: “别浪费时间说空话了。若你所言属实，就必须尽快终结这等亵渎之事。”
languages.original_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

traits.locale_text: “别浪费时间说空话了。若你所言属实，就必须尽快终结这等亵渎之事。”

languages.text: « Nous n'avons pas de temps à perdre en vains discours. Si vous dites vrai, vous devez mettre un terme à cette abomination dès que possible. »
languages.original_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

traits.locale_text: « Nous n'avons pas de temps à perdre en vains discours. Si vous dites vrai, vous devez mettre un terme à cette abomination dès que possible. »

languages.text: "Boş laflarla vakit kaybetmeyelim. Söyledikleriniz doğruysa bu iğrençliğe bir an önce son vermek zorundasınız."
languages.original_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Boş laflarla vakit kaybetmeyelim. Söyledikleriniz doğruysa bu iğrençliğe bir an önce son vermek zorundasınız."

languages.text: «No desperdiciemos el tiempo con palabras vacías. Si lo que dice es cierto, debe acabar con esta abominación cuanto antes».
languages.original_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

traits.locale_text: «No desperdiciemos el tiempo con palabras vacías. Si lo que dice es cierto, debe acabar con esta abominación cuanto antes».

languages.text: "Verschwenden wir keine Zeit mit leeren Worten. Wenn Ihr die Wahrheit sagt, müsst Ihr dieser Abscheulichkeit so schnell wie möglich das Handwerk legen."
languages.original_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Verschwenden wir keine Zeit mit leeren Worten. Wenn Ihr die Wahrheit sagt, müsst Ihr dieser Abscheulichkeit so schnell wie möglich das Handwerk legen."

languages.text: 「無駄な言葉に時間を費やすのはやめましょう。あなたが言ったことが本当なら、この悪事をできるだけ早く止めるべきです。」
languages.original_text: "Let's not waste time on empty words. If what you said is true, then you must put a stop to this abomination as soon as possible."

traits.locale_text: 「無駄な言葉に時間を費やすのはやめましょう。あなたが言ったことが本当なら、この悪事をできるだけ早く止めるべきです。」
